{{Infobox character
| name = Hansin
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mason]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|guard}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Hansin is a [[Mason]] who has served for twenty years as an undercover guard at the [[Imperial Palace]]. He has functioned as a regular guard for [[Lucan]] and is known to [[Shera]], an acquaintance who has visited him many times. His attire typically consists of [[Consultant]]'s blacks, including a black-dyed chain vest and a helmet, though he carries combat equipment such as a [[sword]], a [[pistol]], knives in his boots, and a ring of keys. Throughout his service, he has been involved in inspecting deliveries to prisoners and managing secret entrances, such as a concealed door within a tree trunk. He has also experienced physical trauma, including being struck with an alchemical needle in the neck.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Hansin]] is a character who provides gossip.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Hansin]] is a [[Mason]] guard who watches over [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Hansin is a [[Mason]] who previously served as a guard assigned to a different cell. While wearing an armored uniform, he was discovered in an unconscious state with a stinging sensation in his neck. Later, he shoved a guard and chose to accompany [[Shera]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Hansin]] is a [[Mason]] who worked as a guard and wears an armored uniform.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Hansin]] was found unconscious.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Hansin]] is a guard who was previously guarding a different cell.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Hansin]]'s neck is stinging.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Hansin]] is an individual who shoved a guard and accompanied [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Mason]]
[[Category:Soldiers]]
